productName: Buddies 100% Live Resin All in One Tanker - Melon Sorbet - 1g - (S) - DOH
description: This hybrid disposable carries Melon Sorbet in a ready-to-go pen with the battery built right in — grab it, hit it, recycle it when it's done. Grab-and-go convenience, a light, refreshing melon flavor, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
